member.name: T:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.AdminActionsController
member.summary: Provides access to admin action audit records.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.AdminActionsController.GetAll(System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns a list of admin action audit records, optionally filtered. Requires admin PIN.
member.param: Filter by entity ID (e.g. order ID).
member.response: List of admin actions ordered by CreatedAt descending.

member.name: T:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.CustomersController
member.summary: Manages customers (buyers who place orders).

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.CustomersController.GetAll(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Lists customers with optional search and pagination.
member.param: Free-text search on name, email, or pickup code.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.CustomersController.GetById(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets a single customer by ID.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.CustomersController.Create(HamptonHawksPlantSales.Core.DTOs.CreateCustomerRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new customer.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.CustomersController.Update(System.Guid,HamptonHawksPlantSales.Core.DTOs.UpdateCustomerRequest)
member.summary: Updates an existing customer.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.CustomersController.Delete(System.Guid)
member.summary: Soft-deletes a customer.

member.name: T:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.FulfillmentController
member.summary: Handles order fulfillment: scanning, completing, and resetting orders at the pickup station.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.FulfillmentController.Scan(System.Guid,HamptonHawksPlantSales.Core.DTOs.ScanRequest)
member.summary: Processes a barcode scan against an order, fulfilling matching line items.
member.response: Scan result with match details and updated order state.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.FulfillmentController.UndoLastScan(System.Guid)
member.summary: Undoes the most recent scan on an order, decrementing the fulfilled quantity.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.FulfillmentController.Complete(System.Guid)
member.summary: Marks an order as complete when all lines are fully fulfilled.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.FulfillmentController.ForceComplete(System.Guid)
member.summary: Force-completes an order even with unfulfilled lines. Requires admin PIN.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.FulfillmentController.Reset(System.Guid)
member.summary: Resets an order back to Open status, clearing all fulfillment progress. Requires admin PIN.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.FulfillmentController.GetEvents(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets the fulfillment event history for an order (scans, undos, completions).

member.name: T:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.ImportController
member.summary: Imports data from CSV/Excel files (plants, inventory, orders).

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.ImportController.ImportPlants(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile)
member.summary: Imports plants from a CSV or Excel file.
member.param: CSV or Excel file containing plant data.
member.response: Import result with row counts and any issues.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.ImportController.ImportInventory(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile)
member.summary: Imports inventory quantities from a CSV or Excel file.
member.param: CSV or Excel file containing inventory data.
member.response: Import result with row counts and any issues.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.ImportController.ImportOrders(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile)
member.summary: Imports orders from a CSV or Excel file.
member.param: CSV or Excel file containing order data.
member.response: Import result with row counts and any issues.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.ImportController.GetBatches(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Lists import batches with pagination.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.ImportController.GetBatchIssues(System.Guid,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets issues (warnings/errors) for a specific import batch.

member.name: T:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.InventoryController
member.summary: Manages plant inventory quantities.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.InventoryController.GetAll(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Lists inventory with optional search and pagination.
member.param: Free-text search on plant name or SKU.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.InventoryController.SetInventory(System.Guid,HamptonHawksPlantSales.Core.DTOs.UpdateInventoryRequest)
member.summary: Sets the absolute inventory quantity for a plant.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.InventoryController.AdjustInventory(HamptonHawksPlantSales.Core.DTOs.AdjustInventoryRequest)
member.summary: Adjusts inventory by a relative delta (positive or negative).
member.param: Adjustment details including plant ID and delta.

member.name: T:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.OrdersController
member.summary: Manages customer orders and their line items.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.OrdersController.GetAll(System.String,System.Nullable{HamptonHawksPlantSales.Core.Enums.OrderStatus},System.Nullable{System.Boolean},System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Lists orders with optional filters and pagination.
member.param: Free-text search on order number or customer name.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.OrdersController.GetById(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets a single order by ID, including its line items.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.OrdersController.Create(HamptonHawksPlantSales.Core.DTOs.CreateOrderRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new order with line items.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.OrdersController.Update(System.Guid,HamptonHawksPlantSales.Core.DTOs.UpdateOrderRequest)
member.summary: Updates an existing order's metadata (status, seller, etc.).

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.OrdersController.Delete(System.Guid)
member.summary: Soft-deletes an order.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.OrdersController.AddLine(System.Guid,HamptonHawksPlantSales.Core.DTOs.CreateOrderLineRequest)
member.summary: Adds a line item to an existing order. For walk-up orders, inventory protection is enforced. Provide X-Admin-Pin and X-Admin-Reason headers to override inventory limits (sets hasIssue=true).

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.OrdersController.UpdateLine(System.Guid,System.Guid,HamptonHawksPlantSales.Core.DTOs.UpdateOrderLineRequest)
member.summary: Updates an existing order line item.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.OrdersController.DeleteLine(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Removes a line item from an order.

member.name: T:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.PlantsController
member.summary: Manages the plant catalog (varieties available for sale).

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.PlantsController.GetAll(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Boolean},System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Lists plants with optional search, active-only filter, and pagination.
member.param: Free-text search on name or SKU.
When true, returns only active plants.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.PlantsController.GetById(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets a single plant by its unique identifier.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.PlantsController.Create(HamptonHawksPlantSales.Core.DTOs.CreatePlantRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new plant in the catalog.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.PlantsController.Update(System.Guid,HamptonHawksPlantSales.Core.DTOs.UpdatePlantRequest)
member.summary: Updates an existing plant.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.PlantsController.Delete(System.Guid)
member.summary: Soft-deletes a plant from the catalog.

member.name: T:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.ReportsController
member.summary: Read-only reporting endpoints for dashboards and diagnostics.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.ReportsController.GetDashboardMetrics
member.summary: Gets dashboard summary metrics (total orders, fulfillment progress, etc.).

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.ReportsController.GetLowInventory(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets plants with inventory below the specified threshold.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.ReportsController.GetProblemOrders
member.summary: Gets orders that have issues (e.g., over-fulfilled, stalled).

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.ReportsController.GetSellerOrders(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets order summaries for a specific seller.

member.name: T:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.SellersController
member.summary: Manages sellers (students who sell plants).

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.SellersController.GetAll(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Lists sellers with optional search and pagination.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.SellersController.GetById(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets a single seller by ID.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.SellersController.Create(HamptonHawksPlantSales.Core.DTOs.CreateSellerRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new seller.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.SellersController.Update(System.Guid,HamptonHawksPlantSales.Core.DTOs.UpdateSellerRequest)
member.summary: Updates an existing seller.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.SellersController.Delete(System.Guid)
member.summary: Soft-deletes a seller.

member.name: T:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.SettingsController
member.summary: Manages global application settings including the SaleClosed flag.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.SettingsController.GetSettings
member.summary: Gets the current application settings.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.SettingsController.UpdateSaleClosed(HamptonHawksPlantSales.Core.DTOs.UpdateSaleClosedRequest)
member.summary: Toggles the SaleClosed flag. When closed, new orders and modifications are blocked. Requires admin PIN.

member.name: T:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.VersionController
member.summary: Returns the current API version.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.VersionController.GetVersion
member.summary: Gets the running API version string.

member.name: T:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.WalkUpController
member.summary: Handles walk-up (day-of) orders with inventory protection.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.WalkUpController.CreateOrder(HamptonHawksPlantSales.Core.DTOs.CreateWalkUpOrderRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new walk-up order for a day-of customer.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.WalkUpController.AddLine(System.Guid,HamptonHawksPlantSales.Core.DTOs.AddWalkUpLineRequest)
member.summary: Adds a line item to an existing walk-up order. Admin PIN may be required to exceed available stock.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.WalkUpController.UpdateLine(System.Guid,System.Guid,HamptonHawksPlantSales.Core.DTOs.UpdateWalkUpLineRequest)
member.summary: Updates a line item on a walk-up order. Admin PIN may be required to exceed available stock.

member.name: M:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Controllers.WalkUpController.GetAvailability(System.Nullable{System.Guid})
member.summary: Gets the available walk-up quantity for plants. Returns all active plants when no plantCatalogId is specified.
member.param: Optional plant catalog ID. If omitted, returns all active plants.
member.response: Available walk-up quantity or list of all plant availabilities.

member.name: T:HamptonHawksPlantSales.Api.Filters.RequiresAdminPinAttribute
member.summary: Placeholder attribute for admin PIN verification. The actual AdminPinActionFilter is provided by sub-spec 4.
